title: Simple Statues
description: 20 new Vanilla-style statues that can be used as decoration or for redstone mechanisms!
body:
![Simple Statues Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/SIMPLE_STATUES_R1/MP_SIMPLE_Header.webp)
![Statues](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aadd91ce1b2feb3961b6346520a523896404807a.png)
![Description](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/SIMPLE_STATUES_R1/MP_SIMPLE_Description.webp)
Simple Statues is a **lightweight Vanilla+** mod that adds quite a few **statues** as **decoration** to your game. There are statues for **multiple types of stone** with many different **poses**. Some statues can even emit** redstone signals**, allowing you to build the perfect **secret tunnel**.

Every statue can be obtained by crafting them through a **stonecutter** with the corresponding material, e.g. every Stone Statue can be cut from a block of stone.
